description: Freshly prepared with locally sourced ingredients, our Fried Salmon Special is served with seasoned vegetables and island-style rice for a flavorful coastal dining experience.
A rich and refreshing treat featuring creamy chocolate ice cream layered between soft cookies, perfect for cooling down after a day in the sun.
Enjoy a wide selection of seafood, grilled specialties, fresh fruit, and chef-prepared favorites in our daily buffet designed to satisfy every appetite.
